summary: First iteration testing for AURRUM INTELLIGENCE landing page. All backend endpoints (health, market-snapshot, contact CRUD + validation, newsletter idempotent subscribe) passed pytest. All 25+ requested frontend data-testids present. Contact form end-to-end (fill fields + swing pill + submit) shows success. Newsletter subscribe shows 'SUBSCRIBED' state. Smooth scrolling via nav-link-pricing works (scrollY=6462). Team images loaded (naturalWidth > 0). Custom cursor orb (dot + ring) present. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores created_at as ISO string in Mongo but Pydantic model expects datetime; list_contacts manually converts. Consider storing as native BSON datetime for consistency.
GET /api/contact has no auth — any client can list all submissions. If this is a public marketing site, consider protecting or removing this endpoint before production.
seed_data_creation: Test contact submission (TEST_ prefixed) and a random newsletter email were created during tests; safe to keep or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact form testids: contact-input-name / contact-input-email / contact-input-message (NOT contact-name). Hero headline text contains newlines: 'Read the\nmarket.\nTrade the edge.' — use substring or regex checks. Backend URL is https://aurrum-quantum-ui.preview.emergentagent.com. All 5 pytest tests + all UI flows passed cleanly.
